title: ChestTracker
description: This mod adds a chest tracker that tracks production rate by the hour. It can store up to 30 storage blocks and take snapshots of them to calculate production rate. Client side mod.
body:
A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft Fabric that tracks item production rates in chests, barrels, and other containers. Perfect for monitoring your automated farms.
Production Tracking — Monitor how many items your farms produce over time.
Rate Calculation — See items/hour rates for configurable time periods (5m, 10m, 30m, 1h, etc.).
Per-Chest Timers — Set countdown timers to remind you when to check a chest.
Snapshot History — Automatic snapshots record item counts each time you open a tracked container.
Visual Indicators — Tracked chests are highlighted with a green outline.
Double Chest Support — Both halves of a double chest are tracked as one unit.
ModMenu Integration — Access the tracker settings seamlessly from ModMenu.


Look at a chest/barrel and press O to start tracking it.
Press I to open the tracker menu and view production stats.
Open tracked containers periodically to record snapshots.
Use the menu to set timers, change tracked items, or remove chests.
